<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\TextUI; use function sprintf; use RuntimeException; /** * @no-named-arguments Parameter names are not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit * * @internal This class is not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ final class TestFileNotFoundException extends RuntimeException implements Exception { public function __construct(string $path) { parent::__construct( sprintf( 'Test file "%s" not found', $path, ), ); } }
